## Confections.Converters.confection variable

Converter for [ConfectionData](./ts-chocolate.confections.confectiondata.md) with validation. Validates that goldenVersionSpec exists in versions. Returns the plain data object (discriminated union), not a class instance.

**Signature:**

```typescript
confection: Converter<ConfectionData>
```
